tEn: Step-Audio: Unified Understanding and Generation in Intelligent Speech Interaction
tZh: Step-Audio：智能语音交互中的统一理解与生成
sEn: Step-Audio is the first production-ready open-source solution for real-time speech interaction, achieving unified understanding and generation with a 130B-parameter model.
sZh: Step-Audio 是首个面向生产的开源实时语音交互解决方案，通过130B参数模型实现统一理解与生成。
absEn: Real-time speech interaction, serving as a fundamental interface for human-machine collaboration, holds immense potential. However, current open-source models face limitations such as high costs in voice data collection, weakness in dynamic control, and limited intelligence. To address these challenges, this paper introduces Step-Audio, the first production-ready open-source solution. Key contributions include: 1) a 130B-parameter unified speech-text multi-modal model that achieves unified understanding and generation, with the Step-Audio-Chat version open-sourced; 2) a generative speech data engine that establishes an affordable voice cloning framework and produces the open-sourced lightweight Step-Audio-TTS-3B model through distillation; 3) an instruction-driven fine control system enabling dynamic adjustments across dialects, emotions, singing, and RAP; 4) an enhanced cognitive architecture augmented with tool calling and role-playing abilities to manage complex tasks effectively. Based on our new StepEval-Audio-360 evaluation benchmark, Step-Audio achieves state-of-the-art performance in human evaluations, especially in terms of instruction following. On open-source benchmarks like LLaMA Question, shows 9.3% average performance improvement, demonstrating our commitment to advancing the development of open-source multi-modal language technologies. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/stepfun-ai/Step-Audio.
absZh: 实时语音交互作为人机协作的基本接口，潜力巨大。然而，当前开源模型面临语音数据采集成本高、动态控制能力弱、智能水平有限等挑战。为此，本文提出Step-Audio，首个生产级开源解决方案。主要贡献包括：1）130B参数统一语音-文本多模态模型，实现统一理解与生成，并开源Step-Audio-Chat版本；2）生成式语音数据引擎，建立经济实惠的语音克隆框架，并通过蒸馏开源轻量级Step-Audio-TTS-3B模型；3）指令驱动的精细控制系统，支持方言、情感、歌唱和RAP的动态调整；4）增强的认知架构，集成工具调用和角色扮演能力，有效管理复杂任务。基于新提出的StepEval-Audio-360评估基准，Step-Audio在人工评估中达到最先进性能，尤其在指令遵循方面。在LLaMA Question等开源基准上，平均性能提升9.3%，展示了我们对推进开源多模态语言技术发展的承诺。代码和模型见https://github.com/stepfun-ai/Step-Audio。

contrib.en: Proposes Step-Audio, the first production-ready open-source unified speech-text multi-modal model with 130B parameters.
contrib.zh: 提出Step-Audio，首个生产级开源统一语音-文本多模态模型，拥有1300亿参数。

contrib.en: Introduces a generative speech data engine for affordable voice cloning and distills a lightweight Step-Audio-TTS-3B model.
contrib.zh: 引入生成式语音数据引擎，实现低成本语音克隆，并通过蒸馏得到轻量级Step-Audio-TTS-3B模型。

contrib.en: Develops an instruction-driven fine control system enabling dynamic adjustments across dialects, emotions, singing, and RAP.
contrib.zh: 开发指令驱动的精细控制系统，支持方言、情感、歌唱和说唱的动态调整。

contrib.en: Enhances cognitive architecture with tool calling and role-playing abilities for complex task management.
contrib.zh: 增强认知架构，集成工具调用和角色扮演能力，以管理复杂任务。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on the new StepEval-Audio-360 benchmark, especially in instruction following.
contrib.zh: 在全新StepEval-Audio-360基准测试中取得最先进性能，尤其在指令遵循方面。

contrib.en: Demonstrates 9.3% average improvement on open-source benchmarks like LLaMA Question, advancing open-source multi-modal language technologies.
contrib.zh: 在LLaMA Question等开源基准上平均提升9.3%，推动开源多模态语言技术发展。

limits.en: The model's performance on pure voice dialogue (AQAA) is not yet fully optimized, relying on intermediate text conversion.
limits.zh: 模型在纯语音对话（AQAA）上的性能尚未完全优化，依赖中间文本转换。

limits.en: The synthetic data engine may introduce biases from the seed data and requires careful quality control.
limits.zh: 合成数据引擎可能引入种子数据的偏差，需要仔细的质量控制。

limits.en: The system's speculative response mechanism incurs occasional redundant computations, reducing efficiency.
limits.zh: 系统的推测响应机制偶尔导致冗余计算，降低效率。

limits.en: The current framework focuses on speech-text integration and has not yet incorporated vision modality natively.
limits.zh: 当前框架专注于语音-文本集成，尚未原生融入视觉模态。

limits.en: The evaluation benchmark StepEval-Audio-360 is primarily in Chinese, limiting generalizability to other languages.
limits.zh: 评估基准StepEval-Audio-360主要面向中文，限制了向其他语言的泛化能力。

items.en: Real-time speech interaction, serving as a fundamental interface for human-machine collaboration, holds immense potential. However, current open-source models face limitations such as high costs in voice data collection, weakness in dynamic control, and limited intelligence. To address these challenges, this paper introduces Step-Audio, the first production-ready open-source solution. Key contributions include: 1) a 130B-parameter unified speech-text multi-modal model that achieves unified understanding and generation, with the Step-Audio-Chat version open-sourced; 2) a generative speech data engine that establishes an affordable voice cloning framework and produces the open-sourced lightweight Step-Audio-TTS-3B model through distillation; 3) an instruction-driven fine control system enabling dynamic adjustments across dialects, emotions, singing, and RAP; 4) an enhanced cognitive architecture augmented with tool calling and role-playing abilities to manage complex tasks effectively. Based on our new StepEval-Audio-360 evaluation benchmark, Step-Audio achieves state-of-the-art performance in human evaluations, especially in terms of instruction following. On open-source benchmarks like LLaMA Question, shows 9.3% average performance improvement, demonstrating our commitment to advancing the development of open-source multi-modal language technologies. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/stepfun-ai/Step-Audio.
items.zh: 实时语音交互作为人机协作的基础接口，具有巨大潜力。然而，当前开源模型面临语音数据采集成本高、动态控制能力弱、智能水平有限等限制。为解决这些挑战，本文介绍 Step-Audio，首个生产就绪的开源解决方案。主要贡献包括：1）一个 130B 参数的统一语音-文本多模态模型，实现了统一的理解与生成，并开源了 Step-Audio-Chat 版本；2）一个生成式语音数据引擎，建立了经济实惠的语音克隆框架，并通过蒸馏产生了开源的轻量级 Step-Audio-TTS-3B 模型；3）一个指令驱动的精细控制系统，支持方言、情感、歌唱和 RAP 的动态调整；4）一个增强的认知架构，通过工具调用和角色扮演能力来有效管理复杂任务。基于我们新的 StepEval-Audio-360 评估基准，Step-Audio 在人工评估中达到了最先进的性能，特别是在指令遵循方面。在 LLaMA Question 等开源基准上，平均性能提升 9.3%，展示了我们推动开源多模态语言技术发展的承诺。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/stepfun-ai/Step-Audio 获取。

items.en: The evolution of artificial intelligence toward general-purpose systems has positioned real-time speech interaction as a critical interface for human-machine collaboration. While recent multi-modal large language models (LLMs) have accelerated progress in this domain, open-source communities face persistent challenges despite breakthroughs in proprietary systems like GPT-4o (Hurst \BOthers., \APACyear2024) and Doubao (bytedance, \APACyear2024). Existing open-source models such as Qwen2-Audio (Chu \BOthers., \APACyear2024\APACexlab\BCnt1), Llama 3 (Dubey \BOthers., \APACyear2024) and wavLLM (Hu \BOthers., \APACyear2024) struggle with three fundamental limitations: the separation of understanding and generation processes that impedes end-to-end system integration, dependence on laborious manual speech data acquisition methods that restricts efficient voice replication, and inadequate precision in regulating prosodic features, regional dialects, and tool utilization capabilities. These limitations highlight the urgent demand for deployable frameworks that harmonize streamlined architecture with dual competencies in affective computing (accurate emotion perception and adjustment) and contextual cognition (situational reasoning and response formulation).
items.zh: 人工智能向通用系统的演进已将实时语音交互定位为人机协作的关键接口。尽管最近的多模态大语言模型（LLM）加速了该领域的进展，但开源社区仍面临持续挑战，尽管 GPT-4o（Hurst 等，2024）和豆包（字节跳动，2024）等专有系统取得了突破。现有的开源模型如 Qwen2-Audio（Chu 等，2024）、Llama 3（Dubey 等，2024）和 wavLLM（Hu 等，2024）在三个基本限制上挣扎：理解与生成过程的分离阻碍了端到端系统集成；依赖费力的手动语音数据采集方法限制了高效的语音复制；以及在韵律特征、地域方言和工具利用能力方面的调控精度不足。这些限制凸显了对可部署框架的迫切需求，该框架应协调精简架构与情感计算（准确的情感感知与调整）和情境认知（情境推理与响应制定）的双重能力。

items.en: Current open-source speech systems confront multiple architectural challenges. The traditional framework employs a cascading approach (Huang \BOthers., \APACyear2024) combining Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), LLM processing, and Text-to-Speech (TTS). This framework introduces error propagation through modality transitions while increasing system complexity. Pure end-to-end approaches, though conceptually elegant, often sacrifice performance in open-domain dialogue quality (Zeng \BOthers., \APACyear2024). The tension between modular design and fully integrated systems remains unresolved. Furthermore, traditional text-to-speech pipelines depend on manually curated datasets, particularly for multilingual and multidialect scenarios—a process requiring prohibitive human annotation effort. Existing solutions also lack sophisticated control mechanisms for dynamic speech adaptation, such as real-time adjustment of speaking rate, emotional prosody, or musical rendering (e.g., Singing and RAP vocals). Crucially, the absence of tool invocation capabilities and contextual awareness prevents handling complex queries like “Retrieve live weather data and report it in Cantonese,” necessitating manual API integration.
items.zh: 当前的开源语音系统面临多个架构挑战。传统框架采用级联方法（Huang 等，2024），结合自动语音识别（ASR）、LLM 处理和文本转语音（TTS）。该框架通过模态转换引入错误传播，同时增加了系统复杂性。纯端到端方法虽然在概念上优雅，但通常在开放域对话质量上牺牲性能（Zeng 等，2024）。模块化设计与完全集成系统之间的张力仍未解决。此外，传统的文本转语音流水线依赖人工策划的数据集，特别是对于多语言和多方言场景——这一过程需要高昂的人工标注工作。现有解决方案也缺乏用于动态语音适应的复杂控制机制，例如实时调整语速、情感韵律或音乐渲染（如歌唱和 RAP 人声）。关键的是，缺乏工具调用能力和情境感知阻碍了处理如“检索实时天气数据并用粤语报告”等复杂查询，需要手动 API 集成。

items.en: This report presents Step-Audio, the first production-ready open-source framework for intelligent speech interaction that harmonizes comprehension and generation through four key innovations.
items.zh: 本报告介绍 Step-Audio，首个生产就绪的开源智能语音交互框架，通过四项关键创新协调理解与生成。

items.en: 130B-Parameter Multi-modal Model: A single unified model integrating comprehension and generation capabilities, performing speech recognition, semantic understanding, dialogue, voice cloning, audio editing and speech synthesis. We have made the 130B Step-Audio-Chat variant open source.
items.zh: 130B 参数多模态模型：一个统一的理解与生成能力的单一模型，执行语音识别、语义理解、对话、语音克隆、音频编辑和语音合成。我们已开源了 130B 的 Step-Audio-Chat 变体。

items.en: Generative Data Engine: Eliminates traditional TTS’s reliance on manual data collection by generating high-quality audio through our 130B-parameter multi-modal model. Leverages this data to train and publicly release a resource-efficient Step-Audio-TTS-3B model with enhanced instruction-following capabilities for controllable speech synthesis.
items.zh: 生成式数据引擎：通过我们的 130B 参数多模态模型生成高质量音频，消除了传统 TTS 对人工数据收集的依赖。利用这些数据训练并公开发布了一个资源高效的 Step-Audio-TTS-3B 模型，具有增强的指令遵循能力，用于可控语音合成。

items.en: Granular Voice Control: Enables precise regulation through instruction-based control design, supporting multiple emotions (anger, joy, sadness), dialects (Cantonese, Sichuanese, etc.), and vocal styles (RAP/Singing, a cappella humming) to meet diverse speech generation needs.
items.zh: 细粒度语音控制：通过基于指令的控制设计实现精确调控，支持多种情感（愤怒、喜悦、悲伤）、方言（粤语、四川话等）和发声风格（RAP/歌唱、无伴奏哼唱），满足多样化的语音生成需求。

items.en: Enhanced Intelligence: Improves agent performance in complex tasks through ToolCall mechanism integration and role-playing enhancements.
items.zh: 增强智能：通过 ToolCall 机制集成和角色扮演增强，提升复杂任务中的智能体性能。

items.en: In open-source benchmarks, Step-Audio demonstrates exceptional performance. It achieves SoTA results on open-domain question answering and complex instruction tasks including LLaMA Question, TrivialQA, and ComplexBench, with an average improvement of 9.3 points compared to the best open-source metrics, validating its advantage in generalized deep semantic understanding capabilities. Additionally, to address the current lack of comprehensive end-to-end speech dialogue evaluation systems, we introduce the multi-dimensional StepEval-Audio-360 evaluation framework covering 9 dimensions, including logical reasoning, creative ability, language proficiency, and comprehension control among other key capabilities. As shown in Figure 1, Step-Audio achieves SoTA results across all dimensions in subjective comparisons against open-source models like GLM-4-Voice and Qwen2-Audio, with improvements of 19.2%, 23.7%, and 43.2% in response quality, response relevance, and factual accuracy respectively. Particularly in generation control dimensions such as emotion understanding, speech rate control, RAP vocals, and role-playing, compared to open-source SoTA models, the IF (Instruction Following) and MOS (Mean Opinion Score) metrics improved by 29.8% and 27.1% respectively, highlighting its leading advantage in complex speech interaction scenarios.
items.zh: 在开源基准上，Step-Audio 表现出色。它在开放域问答和复杂指令任务（包括 LLaMA Question、TrivialQA 和 ComplexBench）上取得了最先进的结果，与最佳开源指标相比平均提升 9.3 分，验证了其在广义深度语义理解能力上的优势。此外，为解决当前缺乏全面端到端语音对话评估系统的问题，我们引入了多维度的 StepEval-Audio-360 评估框架，涵盖 9 个维度，包括逻辑推理、创造能力、语言熟练度和理解控制等关键能力。如图 1 所示，在与 GLM-4-Voice 和 Qwen2-Audio 等开源模型的主观比较中，Step-Audio 在所有维度上均取得最先进结果，在响应质量、响应相关性和事实准确性上分别提升 19.2%、23.7% 和 43.2%。特别是在情感理解、语速控制、RAP 人声和角色扮演等生成控制维度上，与开源最先进模型相比，IF（指令遵循）和 MOS（平均意见分）指标分别提升 29.8% 和 27.1%，凸显了其在复杂语音交互场景中的领先优势。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Human Evaluation of End-to-End Speech Interactions. We conduct comprehensive human assessments comparing Step-Audio against GLM-4-Voice (Zeng \BOthers., \APACyear2024) and Qwen2-Audio (Chu \BOthers., \APACyear2024\APACexlab\BCnt2) across nine critical dimensions: role-playing, logical reasoning, creativity, singing language ability, speech emotion control, gaming interaction, voice instruction following, and voice understanding. Expert evaluators rated end-to-end dialog sessions using Likert scales (1-5) for naturalness and task completion. Step-Audio represents the state-of-the-art (SoTA) across all these dimensions. It is particularly remarkable in language ability, demonstrating a high level of proficiency in grammar, semantics, and language generation. In singing, Step-Audio outshines the other models with its natural pitch control, rhythm accuracy, and overall harmonious vocal output, making it a top - tier performer in these two crucial aspects.
items.capZh: 图 1：端到端语音交互的人工评估。我们进行了全面的人工评估，将 Step-Audio 与 GLM-4-Voice（Zeng 等，2024）和 Qwen2-Audio（Chu 等，2024）在九个关键维度上进行比较：角色扮演、逻辑推理、创造力、歌唱语言能力、语音情感控制、游戏交互、语音指令遵循和语音理解。专家评估员使用李克特量表（1-5）对端到端对话会话的自然度和任务完成度进行评分。Step-Audio 在所有维度上均代表最先进水平。在语言能力上尤为突出，展示了在语法、语义和语言生成方面的高水平熟练度。在歌唱方面，Step-Audio 以其自然的音高控制、节奏准确性和整体和谐的声音输出而超越其他模型，使其在这两个关键方面成为顶级表现者。

items.en: Recent progress in end-to-end speech systems have markedly improved human-AI audio interaction. Early approaches relied on cascaded ASR-LLM-TTS pipelines (Huang \BOthers., \APACyear2024), where distinct modules for speech recognition, language modeling, and speech synthesis are sequentially connected. However, these systems suffered from latency buildup, error propagation, and disjointed optimization. Later approaches sought to enhance integration by directly linking speech encoders to LLMs through trainable adapters (Kong \BOthers., \APACyear2020; Chu \BOthers., \APACyear2024\APACexlab\BCnt1; Das \BOthers., \APACyear2024), though they still required separate TTS modules for audio output.
items.zh: 端到端语音系统的最新进展显著改善了人机音频交互。早期方法依赖级联的 ASR-LLM-TTS 流水线（Huang 等，2024），其中语音识别、语言建模和语音合成的不同模块顺序连接。然而，这些系统存在延迟累积、错误传播和优化不连贯的问题。后来的方法试图通过可训练适配器（Kong 等，2020；Chu 等，2024；Das 等，2024）将语音编码器直接连接到 LLM 来增强集成，尽管它们仍然需要单独的 TTS 模块进行音频输出。

items.en: The emergence of fully end-to-end systems marked a paradigm shift. Architectures like Llama-Omni (Fang \BOthers., \APACyear2024) integrated non-autoregressive (NAR) TTS modules with language models, using connectionist temporal classification (CTC) loss. Freeze-Omni (Wang \BOthers., \APACyear2024) uses a combination of autoregressive and NAR speech decoders. These systems demonstrated improved latency but exhibited limitations in handling emotional nuance and natural conversational flow. MinMo (Q. Chen \BOthers., \APACyear2025) introduced autoregressive speech token prediction through the CosyVoice2 (Du, Wang\BCBL \BOthers., \APACyear2024) decoder, while interleaved modeling approaches (Zeng \BOthers., \APACyear2024; Nguyen \BOthers., \APACyear2024) alternated between text and speech token generation at the sequence level.
items.zh: 完全端到端系统的出现标志着一个范式转变。像 Llama-Omni（Fang 等，2024）这样的架构将非自回归（NAR）TTS 模块与语言模型集成，使用连接主义时间分类（CTC）损失。Freeze-Omni（Wang 等，2024）使用自回归和 NAR 语音解码器的组合。这些系统展示了改进的延迟，但在处理情感细微差别和自然对话流方面存在局限性。MinMo（Q. Chen 等，2025）通过 CosyVoice2（Du, Wang 等，2024）解码器引入了自回归语音词元预测，而交错建模方法（Zeng 等，2024；Nguyen 等，2024）在序列级别交替生成文本和语音词元。

items.en: Parallel decoding architectures like Moshi (Défossez \BOthers., \APACyear2024) and Mini-Omni (Xie \BBA Wu, \APACyear2024) represented a significant leap by generating text and multiple speech codebook tokens simultaneously. These systems achieved lower latency through compressed speech token sequences but faced challenges in preserving linguistic capabilities when scaling speech token bandwidth. Current systems generally specialized in specific aspects: GLM-4-Voice (Zeng \BOthers., \APACyear2024) prioritized latency reduction, while Moshi emphasized speech quality, but none holistically addressed emotion awareness, conversational naturalness, and real-time knowledge integration.
items.zh: 并行解码架构如 Moshi（Défossez 等，2024）和 Mini-Omni（Xie & Wu，2024）通过同时生成文本和多个语音码本词元代表了重大飞跃。这些系统通过压缩语音词元序列实现了更低的延迟，但在扩展语音词元带宽时面临保持语言能力的挑战。当前系统通常专注于特定方面：GLM-4-Voice（Zeng 等，2024）优先考虑延迟降低，而 Moshi 强调语音质量，但没有任何系统全面解决情感意识、对话自然性和实时知识集成。

items.en: Recent methodological advances have systematically investigated emotion-aware interaction paradigms, though their integration with multi-modal frameworks remains nascent. While some systems (Wang \BOthers., \APACyear2024) incorporated basic sentiment analysis, they lacked bidirectional emotional resonance-neither detecting paralinguistic cues in user speech nor generating contextually appropriate emotional responses. The naturalness gap persisted due to LLMs’ tendency toward verbose, text-optimized outputs (Fang \BOthers., \APACyear2024), ill-suited for spoken dialogue. Recent work has introduced task-specific optimizations: LUCY (H. Gao \BOthers., \APACyear2025) adopted the architectural framework of Mini-Omni (Xie \BBA Wu, \APACyear2024), augmented with specialized fine-tuning on conversational datasets for emotion control and function-calling.
items.zh: 最近的方法论进展系统地研究了情感感知交互范式，尽管它们与多模态框架的集成仍处于初期。虽然一些系统（Wang 等，2024）包含了基本的情感分析，但它们缺乏双向情感共鸣——既不能检测用户语音中的副语言线索，也不能生成上下文适当的情感响应。由于 LLM 倾向于冗长、文本优化的输出（Fang 等，2024），不适合口语对话，自然性差距依然存在。最近的工作引入了任务特定优化：LUCY（H. Gao 等，2025）采用了 Mini-Omni（Xie & Wu，2024）的架构框架，并通过对话数据集上的专门微调增强了情感控制和函数调用。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Architecture of Step-Audio. Step-Audio primarily consists of three components: the speech tokenizer, the LLM, and the speech decoder. The speech tokenizer is responsible for discretizing the input speech into tokens. The LLM models both text and speech tokens, while the speech decoder generates the waveform output.
items.capZh: 图 2：Step-Audio 的架构。Step-Audio 主要由三个组件组成：语音分词器、LLM 和语音解码器。语音分词器负责将输入语音离散化为词元。LLM 对文本和语音词元进行建模，而语音解码器生成波形输出。

items.en: Traditional voice dialogue systems typically employ a cascaded architecture comprising ASR, LLM, and TTS modules. However, our proposed model, having undergone comprehensive multi-modal training and alignment of text and audio during the pretraining phase, already possesses end-to-end voice dialogue capabilities. Despite extensive exploration of alternative designs, we ultimately adopted the AQTA (audio input, text output) + TTS framework for real-time voice dialogue as shown in Figure 2, driven by the following considerations:
items.zh: 传统的语音对话系统通常采用由 ASR、LLM 和 TTS 模块组成的级联架构。然而，我们提出的模型在预训练阶段经历了全面的多模态训练和文本与音频的对齐，已经具备端到端的语音对话能力。尽管对其他设计进行了广泛探索，我们最终采用了 AQTA（音频输入，文本输出）+ TTS 框架用于实时语音对话，如图 2 所示，基于以下考虑：

items.en: Scarcity of high-quality pure-voice dialogue data: The limited availability of pure-voice dialogue data, coupled with its constrained scenarios, restricts the training efficiency of end-to-end voice dialogue models.
items.zh: 高质量纯语音对话数据的稀缺性：纯语音对话数据的有限可用性及其受限场景限制了端到端语音对话模型的训练效率。

items.en: Controllability and customization of output speech: By incorporating a TTS module, we gain flexible control over speech parameters such as timbre and pitch to meet users’ personalized demands, while continuously enhancing the model’s expressive capabilities.
items.zh: 输出语音的可控性和定制化：通过集成 TTS 模块，我们可以灵活控制音色和音高等语音参数，以满足用户的个性化需求，同时不断增强模型的表达能力。

items.en: Our goal is to establish Step-Audio as a real-time multi-modal model that seamlessly integrates speech understanding and synthesis through four key components: (1) A dual-codebook tokenization framework employing parallel linguistic (16.7Hz, 1024-codebook) and semantic (25Hz, 4096-codebook) tokenizers with 2:3 temporal interleaving; (2) A 130B-parameter LLM based on Step-1 (StepFun, \APACyear2024\APACexlab\BCnt1), enhanced through audio-contextualized continual pretraining and postraining; (3) A hybrid speech synthesizer combining with flow matching and neural vocoder, optimized for real-time waveform generation. In addition, a Voice Activity Detection (VAD) module was employed to extract vocal segments.
items.zh: 我们的目标是将 Step-Audio 建立为一个实时多模态模型，通过四个关键组件无缝集成语音理解与合成：（1）一个双码本分词框架，采用并行语言（16.7Hz，1024 码本）和语义（25Hz，4096 码本）分词器，具有 2:3 的时间交错；（2）一个基于 Step-1（StepFun，2024）的 130B 参数 LLM，通过音频上下文化的持续预训练和后训练增强；（3）一个混合语音合成器，结合流匹配和神经声码器，针对实时波形生成优化。此外，还使用了语音活动检测（VAD）模块来提取语音片段。

items.en: To overcome the limitations of conventional speech tokenizers, which separately capture information for understanding or generation task, we propose a dual-codebook speech tokenizer framework in Step-Audio similar to ARCON (Ming \BOthers., \APACyear2024). This approach employs two distinct tokenizers, linguistic and semantic, to better represent speech features. The linguistic tokenizer is utilized to extract structured, high-level representations, including phonemic and linguistic features, whereas the semantic tokenizer is designed to encode both semantic and coarse-grained acoustic characteristics.
items.zh: 为了克服传统语音分词器的局限性（它们分别捕获用于理解或生成任务的信息），我们在 Step-Audio 中提出了一个类似于 ARCON（Ming 等，2024）的双码本语音分词器框架。该方法采用两个不同的分词器（语言和语义）来更好地表示语音特征。语言分词器用于提取结构化的高层表示，包括音位和语言特征，而语义分词器则设计用于编码语义和粗粒度的声学特征。

items.en: For linguistic tokenization, we utilize the output from the Paraformer (Z. Gao \BOthers., \APACyear2022) encoder, which is quantized into discrete representations at a token rate of 16.7 Hz. For semantic tokenization, we employ CosyVoice’s (Du, Chen\BCBL \BOthers., \APACyear2024) tokenizer, specifically designed to efficiently encode features essential for generating natural and expressive speech outputs, operating at a token rate of 25 Hz. The linguistic tokenizer employs a codebook size of 1024, while the semantic tokenizer utilizes a larger codebook size of 4096 to capture finer acoustic details.
items.zh: 对于语言标记化，我们利用 Paraformer (Z. Gao 等人，2022) 编码器的输出，该输出被量化为离散表示，标记率为 16.7 Hz。对于语义标记化，我们采用 CosyVoice (Du, Chen 等人，2024) 的标记器，该标记器专门设计用于高效编码生成自然且富有表现力的语音输出所需特征，标记率为 25 Hz。语言标记器使用 1024 的码本大小，而语义标记器使用更大的 4096 码本大小以捕获更精细的声学细节。

items.en: To effectively integrate these two tokenization schemes, we implement a token-level interleaving approach inspired by SpiritLM (Nguyen \BOthers., \APACyear2024). Given the differing token rates, we establish a temporal alignment ratio of 2:3, where every two linguistic tokens are paired with three semantic tokens.
items.zh: 为了有效整合这两种标记化方案，我们实现了受 SpiritLM (Nguyen 等人，2024) 启发的标记级交错方法。鉴于不同的标记率，我们建立了 2:3 的时间对齐比率，其中每两个语言标记与三个语义标记配对。

items.en: To enhance Step-Audio’s ability to effectively process speech information and achieve accurate speech-text alignment, we conducted audio continual pretraining based on Step-1, a 130-billion parameter pretrained text-based LLM. The details of the pretrain and post-train processes for Step-Audio are comprehensively discussed in section 4 and 5.
items.zh: 为了增强 Step-Audio 有效处理语音信息并实现准确的语音-文本对齐的能力，我们基于 Step-1（一个 1300 亿参数的预训练文本大语言模型）进行了音频持续预训练。Step-Audio 的预训练和后训练过程的详细信息在第 4 节和第 5 节中全面讨论。

items.en: In multi-turn dialogue systems, the substantial disparity in length between audio tokens and text tokens necessitates efficient processing strategies. To address this, historical information is initially transcribed into textual format utilizing an ASR model prior to system input, thereby optimizing computational efficiency. However, it should be noted that the model architecture maintains the capability to process and utilize audio tokens as historical context when required.
items.zh: 在多轮对话系统中，音频标记和文本标记之间的长度巨大差异需要高效的处理策略。为了解决这个问题，在系统输入之前，历史信息首先通过 ASR 模型转录为文本格式，从而优化计算效率。然而，需要注意的是，模型架构在需要时仍保持处理和利用音频标记作为历史上下文的能力。

items.en: Speech decoder consists of a 3-billion parameter language model, a flow-matching model and a mel-to-wave vocoder primarily designed to receive text or audio tokens and generate continuous time-domain stylized waveform that incorporate historical information and instructions. To optimize the intelligibility and naturalness of the synthesized speech, the speech decoder is trained using a dual-code interleaving approach, ensuring seamless integration of linguistic and semantic features throughout the generation process. On a speech decoder with a larger parameter, we have observed the emergence of enhanced generative capabilities. For further details, please refer to section 5.1.
items.zh: 语音解码器由一个 30 亿参数的语言模型、一个流匹配模型和一个 mel-to-wave 声码器组成，主要设计用于接收文本或音频标记，并生成包含历史信息和指令的连续时域风格化波形。为了优化合成语音的可懂度和自然度，语音解码器使用双码交错方法进行训练，确保在生成过程中语言和语义特征的无缝集成。在参数更大的语音解码器上，我们观察到增强生成能力的出现。更多细节请参考第 5.1 节。

items.capEn: Figure 3: The architecture of the real - time inference pipeline aims to enable real-time interactions. When audio is input, it’s processed concurrently by the streaming audio tokenizer and the voice activity detection module. The controller manages state transitions. A pause in user speech triggers speculative response generation, with multiple calls made but only one response committed. The context manager handles the conversation history in text format for continuity. Once the user finishes speaking, the system enters the reply state, commits a speculative response, and outputs audio. After that, it returns to the idle state for the next interaction.
items.capZh: 图 3：实时推理流水线的架构旨在实现实时交互。当输入音频时，它由流式音频标记器和语音活动检测模块并发处理。控制器管理状态转换。用户语音暂停触发推测性响应生成，多次调用但仅提交一个响应。上下文管理器以文本格式处理对话历史以保持连续性。一旦用户结束说话，系统进入回复状态，提交推测性响应并输出音频。之后，它返回空闲状态以进行下一次交互。

items.en: To enable real-time interactions, we have designed an optimized inference pipeline as shown in Figure 3. At its core, the Controller module manages state transitions, orchestrates speculative response generation, and ensures seamless coordination between critical subsystems. These subsystems include VAD for detecting user speech, the Streaming Audio Tokenizer for processing audio in real-time, the Step-Audio language model and Speech Decoder for processing and generating responses, and the Context Manager for preserving conversational continuity.
items.zh: 为了实现实时交互，我们设计了一个优化的推理流水线，如图 3 所示。其核心是控制器模块，它管理状态转换，协调推测性响应生成，并确保关键子系统之间的无缝协调。这些子系统包括用于检测用户语音的 VAD、用于实时处理音频的流式音频标记器、用于处理和生成响应的 Step-Audio 语言模型和语音解码器，以及用于保持对话连续性的上下文管理器。

items.en: To reduce interaction latency, the system preemptively generates speculative responses. This minimizes perceived delays and enhances responsiveness, though at the cost of occasional redundant computations when speculative responses are discarded. The system begins in the Silence state, awaiting user input. When the VAD detects active speech, the system transitions to the UserSpeaking state. During this state, the Streaming Audio Tokenizer begins converting audio into tokens. If the user momentarily pauses, the system enters the UserPaused state, where speculative response generation is triggered. By preemptively generating a response in anticipation of input completion, the system reduces latency when the conversation resumes. If the user resumes speaking, the speculative response is discarded. Once the system confidently determines that the user has finished speaking, it transitions to the BotReplying state, commits the most recent speculative response, and delivers its audio output. If interrupted by user speech, the system prioritizes the new input while maintaining conversational continuity. After completing its response, the system returns to the Silence state, ready for the next interaction. Empirical analysis shows that approximately 40% of speculative responses are successfully committed. This mechanism reduces per-response latency by approximately 500ms compared to non-speculative methods.
items.zh: 为了减少交互延迟，系统抢先生成推测性响应。这最小化了感知延迟并增强了响应性，尽管在推测性响应被丢弃时偶尔会带来冗余计算。系统从静默状态开始，等待用户输入。当 VAD 检测到活动语音时，系统转换到用户说话状态。在此状态下，流式音频标记器开始将音频转换为标记。如果用户暂时停顿，系统进入用户暂停状态，此时触发推测性响应生成。通过抢先生成响应以预期输入完成，系统在对话恢复时减少了延迟。如果用户恢复说话，推测性响应被丢弃。一旦系统确信用户已结束说话，它转换到机器人回复状态，提交最近的推测性响应并输出音频。如果被用户语音打断，系统优先处理新输入，同时保持对话连续性。完成响应后，系统返回静默状态，准备下一次交互。实证分析表明，大约 40% 的推测性响应被成功提交。与非推测性方法相比，该机制将每次响应延迟减少了约 500 毫秒。

items.en: Our system utilizes text transcription instead of raw audio tokens for historical context, as it provides a more compact representation (with an average text-to-audio token ratio of 1:14), improving performance, and enabling longer conversations with minimal impact on quality. ASR asynchronously transcribes user speech into text, maintaining an accurate and up-to-date conversation history.
items.zh: 我们的系统使用文本转录而不是原始音频标记作为历史上下文，因为它提供了更紧凑的表示（平均文本与音频标记比率为 1:14），提高了性能，并支持更长的对话，对质量影响最小。ASR 异步将用户语音转录为文本，维护准确且最新的对话历史。

items.en: The input audio stream is processed through two parallel tokenizer pipelines, each employing fixed-duration segmentation. The resulting tokens are seamlessly merged into a single sequence with a 2:3 interleaving ratio. Without the streaming audio tokenizer, the inference time will be significantly slower, depending on the length of the audio input.
items.zh: 输入音频流通过两个并行的标记器流水线处理，每个流水线采用固定时长分段。生成的标记以 2:3 的交错比率无缝合并为单个序列。如果没有流式音频标记器，推理时间将显著变慢，具体取决于音频输入的长度。

items.en: Our multi-modal pretraining dataset integrates three major categories of data resources: audio, text, and images. The audio section comprises 1.1 trillion tokens of audio continuation data (approximately 7,300,000 hours), 113 billion tokens of TTS (Text-to-Speech) synthesized speech data (about 700,000 hours), 105 billion tokens of ASR (Automatic Speech Recognition) data (around 650,000 hours), and 350 billion tokens of audio-text alternating data (approximately 2,000,000 hours). The text data, amounting to 800 billion tokens, encompasses web documents, books, code, and proprietary materials. The image section includes 800 billion tokens of image-text paired/alternating data, sourced from web pages, books, and proprietary resources.
items.zh: 我们的多模态预训练数据集整合了三大类数据资源：音频、文本和图像。音频部分包括 1.1 万亿标记的音频续写数据（约 7,300,000 小时）、1130 亿标记的 TTS（文本到语音）合成语音数据（约 700,000 小时）、1050 亿标记的 ASR（自动语音识别）数据（约 650,000 小时）以及 3500 亿标记的音频-文本交替数据（约 2,000,000 小时）。文本数据共计 8000 亿标记，涵盖网页文档、书籍、代码和专有材料。图像部分包括 8000 亿标记的图像-文本配对/交替数据，来源于网页、书籍和专有资源。

items.en: Step-Audio is a component of Step-Omni, which is designed to train a unified pretrained model for speech, image, and text. This training is based on a pretrained text model and image encoder for continued pretraining. The entire process is divided into three stages in total.
items.zh: Step-Audio 是 Step-Omni 的一个组成部分，Step-Omni 旨在训练一个用于语音、图像和文本的统一预训练模型。该训练基于预训练文本模型和图像编码器进行持续预训练。整个过程总共分为三个阶段。

items.en: Stage1: We expanded the vocabulary of the pretrained text model by adding 5,120 audio tokens and integrated a pretrained image encoder to form the Step-Omni model. During training, to ensure minimal loss of the text model’s capabilities, the learning rate of the text model backbone is maintained at a low level (2e-5) throughout. However, the learning rates for the embedding and language model (LM) head are set five times higher than the backbone’s to facilitate faster convergence of the newly added tokens. Meanwhile, the image encoder remains frozen during the entire training process. At this stage, audio, text, and image data are used in a 2:1:1 ratio, with audio data consisting solely of pure audio continuation tasks.
items.zh: 阶段 1：我们通过添加 5,120 个音频标记扩展了预训练文本模型的词汇表，并集成了一个预训练图像编码器以形成 Step-Omni 模型。在训练期间，为了确保文本模型能力的最小损失，文本模型主干的学习率始终保持较低水平（2e-5）。然而，嵌入层和语言模型（LM）头的学习率设置为主干的五倍，以促进新添加标记的更快收敛。同时，图像编码器在整个训练过程中保持冻结。在此阶段，音频、文本和图像数据以 2:1:1 的比例使用，音频数据仅包含纯音频续写任务。

items.en: Stage2: After training on 1.2T tokens in the stage1 phase, we incorporate audio-text interleaved data for further training, with a 1:1 ratio of audio continuation data to audio-text interleaved data. During this stage, the ratio of audio, text, and image data remains 2:1:1.
items.zh: 阶段 2：在阶段 1 训练了 1.2T 标记后，我们加入音频-文本交错数据进行进一步训练，音频续写数据与音频-文本交错数据的比例为 1:1。在此阶段，音频、文本和图像数据的比例保持 2:1:1。

items.en: Stage3: After training on 800B tokens in the stage2 phase, we incorporate ASR and TTS data for further training. The ratio of audio continuation data, audio-text interleaved data, ASR data, and TTS data is set to 1:1:1:1. During this phase, the ratio of audio, text, and image data is adjusted to 4:3:3. Additionally, the learning rates for the embedding and LM head are synchronized with the backbone, utilizing a cosine schedule that decreases from 2e-5 to 5e-6.
items.zh: 阶段 3：在阶段 2 训练了 800B 标记后，我们加入 ASR 和 TTS 数据进行进一步训练。音频续写数据、音频-文本交错数据、ASR 数据和 TTS 数据的比例设置为 1:1:1:1。在此阶段，音频、文本和图像数据的比例调整为 4:3:3。此外，嵌入层和 LM 头的学习率与主干同步，采用余弦调度，从 2e-5 递减到 5e-6。

items.en: We employ the same pre-training strategy across models of varying parameter scales.
items.zh: 我们对不同参数规模的模型采用相同的预训练策略。

items.en: We train Step-Omni on thousands of H800 GPUs with 35% Model Flops Utilization (MFU). Despite employing the standard optimizations such as tailored GPU kernels and communication overlap, we highlight two innovative approaches that further enhance our training efficiency.
items.zh: 我们在数千个 H800 GPU 上训练 Step-Omni，模型算力利用率（MFU）为 35%。尽管采用了标准优化，如定制的 GPU 内核和通信重叠，我们强调两种进一步提高训练效率的创新方法。

items.en: The processing of multi-modality data in Step-Omni training is computationally intensive, often requiring substantial CPU resources to keep pace with the model training speed. Conventional implementations typically co-locate data processing tasks with training jobs, leading to significant interference between these tasks and ultimately slowing down the training process. To address this issue, we introduce StarWeaver, an RPC-based distributed data processing library. StarWeaver relocates CPU-intensive data pre-processing tasks to remote processes, thereby alleviating the computational burden on the GPU training side and enhancing overall training efficiency. StarWeaver also facilitates the enhancement of load balancing in the data-parallel dimension, as it serves as an ideal mechanism for redistributing data with global workload information.
items.zh: Step-Omni 训练中多模态数据的处理计算密集，通常需要大量 CPU 资源以跟上模型训练速度。传统实现通常将数据处理任务与训练任务放在同一位置，导致这些任务之间严重干扰，最终减慢训练过程。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 StarWeaver，一个基于 RPC 的分布式数据处理库。StarWeaver 将 CPU 密集型的数据预处理任务转移到远程进程，从而减轻 GPU 训练端的计算负担，提高整体训练效率。StarWeaver 还有助于增强数据并行维度的负载均衡，因为它作为利用全局工作负载信息重新分配数据的理想机制。

items.en: For multi-modal models such as Step-Omni, training typically involves not only LLM but also modality encoders (e.g., vision encoder). Integrating these diverse components challenges the conventional assumption of training frameworks that the model is homogeneous and monolithic. This mismatch often results in suboptimal training efficiency. To address this issue, we propose disaggregated model placement that allocates dedicated resources and employs tailored parallelism strategies for each sub-model. This novel approach effectively minimizes pipeline bubbles caused by model heterogeneity, thereby achieving optimal training efficiency. Details can be found at (Zhang \BOthers., \APACyear2024).
items.zh: 对于像 Step-Omni 这样的多模态模型，训练通常不仅涉及 LLM，还涉及模态编码器（例如视觉编码器）。整合这些多样化的组件挑战了训练框架的传统假设，即模型是同质且整体的。这种不匹配通常导致训练效率次优。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了分离式模型放置，为每个子模型分配专用资源并采用定制的并行策略。这种新颖方法有效减少了由模型异构性引起的流水线气泡，从而实现了最佳训练效率。详情见 (Zhang 等人，2024)。

full.secZh: 4.4 音频预训练分词器探索

items.en: To achieve the unification of speech understanding and generation, we first explored the use of a speech tokenizer. Initially, we investigated the training approach using a single codebook. In our experiments, we found that when training the model using only semantic tokens, the next token prediction perplexity is relatively low, and the semantic coherence between the generated content and the preceding context is good. However, due to the significant loss of acoustic information from discarding too many semantic tokens, the subsequent audio restoration through the vocoder suffers severe degradation in terms of timbre and prosody, resulting in poor auditory quality. When only using linguistic tokens for training, the audio recovered by the vocoder from the model’s continuation sounds good, but the next token prediction perplexity is very high, and the semantic coherence between the continuation and the preceding context is poor.
items.zh: 为了实现语音理解和生成的统一，我们首先探索了使用语音标记器。最初，我们研究了使用单个码本的训练方法。在我们的实验中，我们发现当仅使用语义标记训练模型时，下一个词预测的困惑度相对较低，生成内容与前面上下文之间的语义连贯性良好。然而，由于丢弃过多语义标记导致声学信息严重丢失，后续通过声码器恢复的音频在音色和韵律方面严重退化，导致听觉质量差。当仅使用语言标记进行训练时，从模型续写中通过声码器恢复的音频听起来不错，但下一个词预测的困惑度非常高，续写与前面上下文之间的语义连贯性差。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Training loss comparison between Dual-Codebook and Single Codebook Tokenizer.
items.capZh: 图4：双码本分词器与单码本分词器的训练损失对比。

items.en: When training with interleaved semantic tokens and linguistic tokens, the semantic tokens ensure the semantic coherence of the continuation with the preceding context, while the linguistic tokens ensure the auditory quality of the reconstructed audio. Due to the mutual reference between semantic tokens and linguistic tokens, we observed that when using dual-codebook training, the next token prediction perplexity for both semantic tokens and linguistic tokens decreased compared to using a single codebook as shown in Figure 4. Notably, the decrease in next token prediction perplexity for semantic tokens was more significant. Furthermore, ASR ablation results indicated that the dual-codebook model achieved a lower character error rate (CER) on the ASR test set compared to the pure single-codebook model(see section 6.2.1).
items.zh: 当使用交错的语义词元和语言词元进行训练时，语义词元确保续写与先前上下文的语义连贯性，而语言词元则保证重建音频的听觉质量。由于语义词元和语言词元之间的相互参考，我们观察到，与使用单码本相比，使用双码本训练时，语义词元和语言词元的下一个词预测困惑度均有所下降，如图4所示。值得注意的是，语义词元的下一个词预测困惑度下降更为显著。此外，ASR消融实验结果表明，与纯单码本模型相比，双码本模型在ASR测试集上取得了更低的字符错误率（CER）（见第6.2.1节）。

items.en: Furthermore, grouping and interleaving linguistic discrete tokens and semantic discrete tokens in a 2:3 ratio facilitates faster convergence of training loss. More importantly, extending the CosyVoice semantic tokens with linguistic tokens enhances the model’s ability to understand and follow multi-turn history instructions and also mitigates issues such as unclear pronunciation and indistinct articulation, significantly boosting the performance of CosyVoice’s single code.
items.zh: 此外，将语言离散词元和语义离散词元按2:3的比例分组并交错排列，有助于训练损失的更快收敛。更重要的是，用语言词元扩展CosyVoice的语义词元，增强了模型理解和遵循多轮历史指令的能力，同时也缓解了发音不清、吐字含糊等问题，显著提升了CosyVoice单码的性能。

items.en: High-quality speech data is crucial for TTS task, as it directly impacts the model’s performance and the expressiveness of the generated speech. Language-specific data, dialect data, speaking styles, emotional data, and paralinguistic data are extremely scarce. Constructing such datasets demands substantial human and financial resources, and the process generally spans an extended period.
items.zh: 高质量的语音数据对于TTS任务至关重要，它直接影响模型的性能和生成语音的表现力。特定语言数据、方言数据、说话风格数据、情感数据和副语言数据极为稀缺。构建此类数据集需要大量人力和财力资源，且过程通常耗时较长。

items.en: To address this gap, we present the first novel synthetic data-driven framework for TTS systems, comprising three key components:
items.zh: 为弥补这一不足，我们首次提出了一种新颖的基于合成数据的TTS系统框架，包含三个关键组件：

items.en: First, we employ a Step-2 (StepFun, \APACyear2024\APACexlab\BCnt2) LLM to generate linguistically diverse and semantically rich textual content.
items.zh: 首先，我们使用Step-2（StepFun，\APACyear2024\APACexlab\BCnt2）大语言模型生成语言多样且语义丰富的文本内容。

items.en: Second, we selected a pre-trained Step-Audio model checkpoint incorporating audio-token cooldown mechanisms, which enables direct generation of speaker-specific, language-dependent, and dialect-aware audio data.
items.zh: 其次，我们选取了一个预训练的Step-Audio模型检查点，该模型集成了音频词元冷却机制，能够直接生成特定说话人、语言和方言的音频数据。

items.en: Third, we developed an Audio-Edit Model by fine-tuning the aforementioned checkpoint, specifically designed to generate nuanced emotional expressions and diverse speaking styles. This model architecture allows for precise control over paralinguistic features while maintaining speaker consistency.
items.zh: 第三，我们通过对上述检查点进行微调，开发了一个音频编辑模型，专门用于生成细腻的情感表达和多样的说话风格。该模型架构允许在保持说话人一致性的同时，精确控制副语言特征。

items.capEn: Figure 5: The process starts with text input which is processed by a Step-2 LLM to generate multiple rewritten texts. Then, a Step-Audio model generates target-speaker data using the rewritten texts and existing audio wav data. Finally, an Audio-Edit model refines the data to produce emotion/style data, addressing the scarcity of high - quality speech data in TTS tasks.
items.capZh: 图5：流程从文本输入开始，由Step-2大语言模型处理生成多个改写文本。然后，Step-Audio模型利用改写文本和现有音频wav数据生成目标说话人数据。最后，音频编辑模型对数据进行精炼，生成情感/风格数据，以解决TTS任务中高质量语音数据稀缺的问题。

items.en: Leveraging the robust continuation ability of Step-Audio, which has been trained on large volumes of speaker and language data, we generate target-speaker, language and dialect data. The text-based LLM Step-2 is used to translate and rewrite chat text to conform to the grammar and style of the target language or dialect. We collect audio recordings and texts from native speakers as prompt audio and text, and then, using the format [system prompt; prompt text; target text; prompt code; target code] along with the corresponding text, we use Step-Audio for audio continuation generation. This method allows for the quick creation of a large amount of native-speaker data for the target language and dialect with only a small quantity of high-quality seed data.
items.zh: 利用Step-Audio强大的续写能力（该模型已在大量说话人和语言数据上训练），我们生成目标说话人、语言和方言数据。基于文本的大语言模型Step-2用于翻译和改写聊天文本，使其符合目标语言或方言的语法和风格。我们收集母语者的音频录音和文本作为提示音频和文本，然后使用格式[系统提示；提示文本；目标文本；提示码；目标码]及对应文本，通过Step-Audio进行音频续写生成。这种方法只需少量高质量种子数据，即可快速创建大量目标语言和方言的母语者数据。

items.en: Emotion and speaking style data have been challenging to deal with because of the difficulty in both differentiating and defining emotion categories and their respective intensities, as well as the complexity associated with accurately describing and recording various style types. To address this, an Audio-Edit model-based approach is proposed. It ingeniously converts complex emotion and style descriptions into a comparative pair data construction format. Step-2 is used to rewrite chat text with specific emotions and styles. Normal and emotional speech samples from the same speaker with identical text are collected, and Step-Audio is used for cloning and continuation generation to create (text, neutral audio token, emotion and style audio token) data. Only the (neutral audio token, emotion and style audio token) pairs are used to perform SFT on the audio cooldown pretrain model to get the Audio-Edit model. Using this model, neutral-style speech can be input to generate emotion or style enhanced audio, and data with different emotion or style intensities can be produced iteratively.
items.zh: 情感和说话风格数据一直难以处理，原因在于情感类别及其强度的区分和定义困难，以及准确描述和记录各种风格类型的复杂性。为此，我们提出了一种基于音频编辑模型的方法，巧妙地将复杂的情感和风格描述转化为对比对数据构建格式。使用Step-2以特定情感和风格改写聊天文本。收集同一说话人相同文本的正常和情感语音样本，利用Step-Audio进行克隆和续写生成，创建（文本，中性音频词元，情感和风格音频词元）数据。仅使用（中性音频词元，情感和风格音频词元）对，对音频冷却预训练模型进行SFT，得到音频编辑模型。使用该模型，可以输入中性风格语音生成情感或风格增强的音频，并可迭代生成不同情感或风格强度的数据。

items.en: We construct a paired dataset of lyrics and vocal segments through three stages: (1) Collecting 10,000+ hours of singing / RAP tracks with LyRiCs-format timestamps; (2) Extracting dry vocals using Demucs (Rouard \BOthers., \APACyear2023) and removing silent regions via Voice Activity Detection(VAD); (3) Segmenting audio using LyRiCs timestamps and aligning lyrics with audio segments. For data cleaning, We performed three steps: (1) RAP Separation: we isolated pure RAP segments by retaining those with higher speech rates and using a genre classification model to identify hip-hop clips; (2) Audio Quality Filtering: Utilizing noise detection and speaker diarization, we preserved low-noise, single-speaker segments; (3) Alignment Verification: To address misalignment due to inaccurate LyRiCs timestamps, we computed the Character Error Rate (CER) between transcribed speech and ground-truth lyrics, discarding misaligned segments. Ultimately, the total length of the retained audio segments constituted 17.8% of the original song durations. This dataset supports dual training objectives: the LLM learns to map lyrics to linguistic and semantic tokens, while the speech decoder decodes these tokens into high-fidelity vocals in precise tunes.
items.zh: 我们通过三个阶段构建歌词和人声片段配对数据集：（1）收集超过10,000小时的歌唱/RAP曲目，包含LyRiCs格式时间戳；（2）使用Demucs（Rouard \BOthers.，\APACyear2023）提取干声，并通过语音活动检测（VAD）去除静音区域；（3）使用LyRiCs时间戳分割音频，并将歌词与音频片段对齐。数据清洗方面，我们执行了三个步骤：（1）RAP分离：通过保留语速较高的片段并使用流派分类模型识别嘻哈片段，分离出纯RAP片段；（2）音频质量过滤：利用噪声检测和说话人日志，保留低噪声、单说话人片段；（3）对齐验证：为解决LyRiCs时间戳不准确导致的对齐错误，我们计算转录语音与真实歌词之间的字符错误率（CER），丢弃未对齐的片段。最终，保留的音频片段总长度占原始歌曲时长的17.8%。该数据集支持双重训练目标：大语言模型学习将歌词映射为语言和语义词元，而语音解码器将这些词元解码为音调精确的高保真人声。

items.en: Supporting multiple languages or dialects for a target speaker is challenging through model generalization of foundational language and dialect data, as it often fails to achieve the level of a native speaker. To mitigate this issue, we employ dual codes extracted from audio generated by native speakers with timbre and prosody similar to the target speaker. These dual codes are combined with the target speaker’s prompt audio to regenerate new audio, from which dual codes are then extracted again. Through this straightforward procedure, the target speaker’s speech in new languages and dialects becomes more akin to that of a native speaker.
items.zh: 通过基础语言和方言数据的模型泛化来支持目标说话人的多种语言或方言具有挑战性，因为往往难以达到母语者水平。为缓解此问题，我们采用从母语者生成的音频中提取的双码，这些音频的音色和韵律与目标说话人相似。将这些双码与目标说话人的提示音频结合，重新生成新音频，然后再次从中提取双码。通过这一简单过程，目标说话人在新语言和方言中的语音变得更接近母语者。

items.en: Quality assessment of data constitutes a critical component in our synthetic data framework. To ensure the reliability and validity of both seed and synthesized data, we have implemented a comprehensive evaluation system incorporating multiple objective metrics: ASR accuracy, Voice Activity Detection (VAD) performance, Speaker Diarization precision, Emotion recognition consistency, and Deep Noise Suppression (DNS) effectiveness. This multi-dimensional quality control mechanism guarantees the robustness and practical utility of generated synthetic data.
items.zh: 数据质量评估是我们合成数据框架中的关键组成部分。为确保种子数据和合成数据的可靠性和有效性，我们实施了一个包含多项客观指标的综合评估系统：ASR准确率、语音活动检测（VAD）性能、说话人日志精度、情感识别一致性以及深度噪声抑制（DNS）效果。这种多维质量控制机制保证了生成合成数据的鲁棒性和实际可用性。

items.en: In contrast to conventional TTS systems that emphasize fine-grained control over speaker characteristics, emotional expression, linguistic features, and stylistic elements, our approach adopts the chat-based paradigm and training methodology of LLMs. This strategic alignment significantly enhances system flexibility while simultaneously establishing a scalable framework to support future model and data expansion, thereby addressing the critical challenges of scalability in speech synthesis systems.
items.zh: 与强调对说话人特征、情感表达、语言特征和风格元素进行细粒度控制的传统TTS系统不同，我们的方法采用了基于聊天的范式和LLM的训练方法。这种战略对齐显著增强了系统灵活性，同时建立了一个可扩展的框架以支持未来的模型和数据扩展，从而解决了语音合成系统中的关键可扩展性挑战。

items.en: The sft format comprises three essential components: the system prompt, the human input, and the assistant response, structured in a two-turn dialogue configuration. Within this format, the system prompt serves as the foundational element for specifying the speaker attributes and defining the supported instruction tags. The human input and the assistant response components are specifically designed to handle the textual content and the dual-codebook representations respectively. The text and audio tokens from the first round can be utilized to maintain the in-domain speaker’s timbre and style consistency, as well as to enable out-domain zero-shot cloning.
items.zh: SFT格式包含三个基本组件：系统提示、人类输入和助手回复，采用两轮对话结构。在此格式中，系统提示作为指定说话人属性和定义支持指令标签的基础元素。人类输入和助手回复组件分别设计用于处理文本内容和双码本表示。第一轮的文本和音频词元可用于保持域内说话人的音色和风格一致性，以及实现域外零样本克隆。

items.en: Instruction tags are classified into two distinct categories: descriptive tags and comparative tags. Descriptive tags are utilized for controlling aspects such as language, dialect, vocal, and style, while comparative tags are employed for hierarchical distinctions in emotion and speed control. The data for descriptive tags are generated using the Step-Audio model clone, supporting languages and styles including Japanese, Korean, Cantonese, Sichuan dialect, cute voice, RAP, and singing. The data for comparative tags are generated using the Audio Edit model, supporting emotions such as happiness, anger, sadness, and speed variations like fast and slow, each divided into five hierarchical levels.
items.zh: 指令标签分为两类：描述性标签和比较性标签。描述性标签用于控制语言、方言、人声和风格等方面，而比较性标签用于情感和速度控制的层次区分。描述性标签的数据使用Step-Audio模型克隆生成，支持的语言和风格包括日语、韩语、粤语、四川话、可爱音、RAP和歌唱。比较性标签的数据使用音频编辑模型生成，支持的情感如快乐、愤怒、悲伤，以及速度变化如快、慢，每种分为五个层次。

items.en: We employ the SFT data as outlined in Section 5.1.1. And utilize a 3-billion parameter model, training it for one epoch with an initial learning rate of 2×10−52\times 10^{-5} .The learning rate is adjusted using a cosine decay strategy, with a lower bound set at 2×10−62\times 10^{-6}.
items.zh: 我们使用第5.1.1节所述的SFT数据，采用30亿参数模型，训练一个epoch，初始学习率为2×10⁻⁵。学习率采用余弦衰减策略调整，下限设为2×10⁻⁶。

items.en: We applied Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) for the AQTA task, leading to the creation of the Step-Audio-Chat model, as depicted in Figure 6.
items.zh: 我们将基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）应用于AQTA任务，从而创建了Step-Audio-Chat模型，如图6所示。

items.capEn: Figure 6: At each training iteration, we collect multiple responses from different versions of the model. Then, through manual scoring, as well as evaluated by a LLM, high-quality pairs are selected to train the reward model. Finally, we use PPO algorithm to train the final Step-Audio-Chat model.
items.capZh: 图6：在每个训练迭代中，我们从不同版本的模型收集多个回复。然后，通过人工评分以及大语言模型评估，选择高质量对来训练奖励模型。最后，使用PPO算法训练最终的Step-Audio-Chat模型。

items.en: We categorized the SFT data into several types based on the nature of the input (Q) and output (A):
items.zh: 我们根据输入（Q）和输出（A）的性质将SFT数据分为几种类型：

items.en: TQTA: This type includes a substantial amount of text-based Question-Answer (QA) data.
items.zh: TQTA：此类型包含大量基于文本的问答（QA）数据。

items.en: AQTA: This type consists of audio inputs paired with textual outputs.
items.zh: AQTA：此类型由音频输入与文本输出配对组成。

items.en: TAQTA: This type is designed to enhance the consistency between text and speech. Here, the text Q serves both as an input (not contributing to the loss calculation) and as an output (contributing to the loss calculation).
items.zh: TAQTA：此类型旨在增强文本与语音之间的一致性。这里，文本Q既作为输入（不参与损失计算）又作为输出（参与损失计算）。

items.en: Other Types: These include audioQ-audioA(AQAA), visionQ-audioQ-textA(VAQTA) and so on. These types are included to provide additional diversity and complexity to the training data, further improving the model’s robustness.
items.zh: 其他类型：包括音频Q-音频A（AQAA）、视觉Q-音频Q-文本A（VAQTA）等。包含这些类型是为了给训练数据提供额外的多样性和复杂性，进一步提高模型的鲁棒性。

items.en: To enhance speech recognition capabilities, we have incorporated additional training data annotated in ASR format alongside existing datasets. These ASR-formatted resources contain detailed transcriptions of speech signals, enabling models to better interpret phonetic patterns and linguistic nuances. The integration of such supplementary ASR-annotated data strengthens model robustness against acoustic variations including regional accents, speaking rate fluctuations, and ambient noise interference.
items.zh: 为了增强语音识别能力，我们在现有数据集的基础上，额外加入了以ASR格式标注的训练数据。这些ASR格式资源包含语音信号的详细转录，使模型能够更好地解释语音模式和语言细微差别。整合这些额外的ASR标注数据增强了模型对声学变化的鲁棒性，包括地区口音、语速波动和环境噪声干扰。

items.en: To optimize the SFT data for effective model training, we implemented the following processing steps:
items.zh: 为了优化SFT数据以实现有效的模型训练，我们实施了以下处理步骤：

items.en: Single-Turn Data Modification: For single-turn interactions, we applied text length filtering to the inputs. This is because real-world user speech inputs are often concise. Additionally, we modified the outputs to adopt a more conversational text style, enhancing the speech model’s human-like qualities and avoiding rigid, verbose, or overly structured responses.
items.zh: 单轮数据修改：对于单轮交互，我们对输入应用了文本长度过滤。这是因为真实用户的语音输入通常很简洁。此外，我们修改了输出，使其采用更对话式的文本风格，增强语音模型的人性化特质，避免生硬、冗长或过于结构化的回复。

items.en: Multi-Turn Data Processing: For multi-turn interactions, we replaced the speech inputs from previous turns with their corresponding text transcriptions. Only the speech input from the final turn was retained. Furthermore, only the response from the final turn was considered in the loss calculation, focusing the model’s training on generating accurate and relevant responses to the most recent input.
items.zh: 多轮数据处理：对于多轮交互，我们将前几轮的语音输入替换为对应的文本转录，仅保留最后一轮的语音输入。此外，损失计算仅考虑最后一轮的回复，将模型训练聚焦于对最新输入生成准确且相关的回复。

items.en: Through this systematic approach to SFT data construction and processing, we aimed to create a diverse and representative dataset that would enable our speech model to achieve superior performance in real-world scenarios, delivering natural, coherent, and contextually appropriate responses to user inputs.
items.zh: 通过这种系统化的SFT数据构建和处理方法，我们旨在创建一个多样且具有代表性的数据集，使我们的语音模型能够在真实场景中实现卓越性能，为用户输入提供自然、连贯且上下文恰当的回复。

items.en: We use SFT data as described in section 5.2.1. And the model is finetuned for 1 epoch with learning rate from 5.656×10−55.656\times 10^{-5} to 5.656×10−65.656\times 10^{-6}.
items.zh: 我们使用第5.2.1节所述的SFT数据。模型微调1个epoch，学习率从5.656×10⁻⁵降至5.656×10⁻⁶。

items.en: We collected human preference data generated by the TQTA model (e.g., Step-1 and Step-2) and removed categories that were less distributed in speech dialogues, such as code and mathematics. We mainly retained categories such as daily conversations, role-playing, safety and instruction following.
items.zh: 我们收集了由TQTA模型（例如Step-1和Step-2）生成的人类偏好数据，并移除了在语音对话中分布较少的类别，如代码和数学。我们主要保留了日常对话、角色扮演、安全性和指令遵循等类别。

items.en: For the fine-tuning dataset, we first collected real audio prompts from users and sampled four responses using the SFT model. We then constructed chosen/rejected pairs by having human annotators rate these four responses on a scale of 1 to 5, based on the criteria of instruction following, conversational naturalness and safety. In addition to these artificially generated labels, we also employed the LLM-as-a-Judge method to score the model’s responses to objective questions and create corresponding chosen/rejected pairs based on responses’ correctness. To mitigate the pattern bias associated with “deaf hacking” as described in 5.2.6, we employed the hacked PPO model to generate responses for input audio with clear audio prompts. If the responses exhibited hacking behavior, we constructed them as rejected responses. This process aimed to eliminate the pattern bias caused by the exclusive presence of “deaf hacking” as chosen responses in the training data of the reward model.
items.zh: 对于微调数据集，我们首先收集用户的真实音频提示，并使用SFT模型采样四个回复。然后，我们让人类标注员根据指令遵循、对话自然性和安全性等标准，对这四种回复进行1到5分的评分，从而构建选择/拒绝对。除了这些人工生成的标签外，我们还采用LLM-as-a-Judge方法对模型对客观问题的回复进行评分，并根据回复的正确性创建相应的选择/拒绝对。为了缓解第5.2.6节所述的“聋子攻击”模式偏差，我们使用被攻击的PPO模型对具有清晰音频提示的输入音频生成回复。如果回复表现出攻击行为，我们将其构建为拒绝回复。此过程旨在消除因奖励模型训练数据中仅存在“聋子攻击”作为选择回复而导致的模式偏差。

items.en: We implement a two-stage approach for reward model training: TQTA single-modal preference model pretraining, followed by AQTA cross-modal fine-tuning. The model is fine-tuned for 1 epoch on TQTA and 1 epoch on AQTA. The learning rate is adjusted using a cosine decay strategy, initialized at 1.24×10−51.24\times 10^{-5} with a lower bound set at 6×10−66\times 10^{-6}.
items.zh: 我们实施两阶段奖励模型训练：TQTA单模态偏好模型预训练，随后是AQTA跨模态微调。模型在TQTA上微调1个epoch，在AQTA上微调1个epoch。学习率采用余弦衰减策略，初始值为1.24×10⁻⁵，下限设为6×10⁻⁶。

items.en: The reward model training initializes from a SFT model and proceeds through the two-stage training using the Bradley-Terry loss (Bradley \BBA Terry, \APACyear1952), achieved a pair-wise accuracy of 70.51% on the human preference test set.
items.zh: 奖励模型训练从SFT模型初始化，并通过两阶段训练使用Bradley-Terry损失（Bradley & Terry, 1952），在人类偏好测试集上达到了70.51%的成对准确率。

items.en: For the PPO training data, we used the same prompt seeds as those employed in the AQTA fine-tuning stage of the reward model.
items.zh: 对于PPO训练数据，我们使用了与奖励模型AQTA微调阶段相同的提示种子。

items.en: After obtaining the reward model, we employ the PPO (Schulman \BOthers., \APACyear2017) algorithm to train speech large language model. During the RLHF training stage, the critic model is warmed up with an initial 80 training steps ahead. We employ a PPO clip threshold of ϵ=0.2\epsilon=0.2 and an initial learning rate of 1×10−61\times 10^{-6}, which decays using a cosine strategy, with a minimum learning rate of 2×10−72\times 10^{-7}. Additionally, we set the KL penalty coefficient to β=0.05\beta=0.05.
items.zh: 获得奖励模型后，我们采用PPO（Schulman等人，2017）算法训练语音大语言模型。在RLHF训练阶段，评论家模型先预热80个训练步。我们采用PPO裁剪阈值ε=0.2，初始学习率为1×10⁻⁶，使用余弦策略衰减，最小学习率为2×10⁻⁷。此外，我们设置KL惩罚系数β=0.05。

items.en: Unlike the reward hacking observed in the RLHF training of TQTA models, we found that a reward model trained exclusively on human-annotated AQTA preference data exhibited a “deaf hacking” phenomenon (i.e., the reward model assigned high reward to responses containing phrases like “I didn’t hear clearly” regardless of input audio clarity, unintentionally reinforcing deaf hacking patterns during RLHF training). We attributed this issue to a pattern bias in the reward model’s training data, which exclusively featured “deaf hacking” pairs: the model responded with “I didn’t hear clearly” to unclear or semantically incomplete prompts as chosen responses but lacked such responses to clear and semantically complete prompts as rejected ones. To mitigate this bias, we constructed corresponding data as mentioned in Section 5.2.3. We also plan to introduce rule-based rewards during RLHF training to eliminate “deaf hacking” in future work.
items.zh: 与TQTA模型RLHF训练中观察到的奖励攻击不同，我们发现仅使用人工标注的AQTA偏好数据训练的奖励模型表现出“聋子攻击”现象（即奖励模型对包含“我没听清”等短语的回复给予高奖励，无论输入音频是否清晰，从而在RLHF训练中无意中强化了聋子攻击模式）。我们将此问题归因于奖励模型训练数据中的模式偏差，该数据仅包含“聋子攻击”对：模型对不清晰或语义不完整的提示回复“我没听清”作为选择回复，但缺乏对清晰且语义完整的提示回复“我没听清”作为拒绝回复。为了缓解这种偏差，我们按照第5.2.3节所述构建了相应数据。我们还计划在未来的工作中，在RLHF训练中引入基于规则的奖励以消除“聋子攻击”。

items.en: We have created a new benchmark, named StepEval-Audio-360111https://huggingface.co/datasets/stepfun-ai/StepEval-Audio-360, following a series of rules. In terms of design principles, this benchmark aims to fill the gaps in the evaluation of multi-modal speech interaction, systematically identify the strengths and weaknesses of the the models, and attach importance to user experience and safety. For data collection, real user recordings are used in combination with public corpora. Meanwhile, strict control is exercised on audio quality and semantic annotation to ensure compliance with privacy.
items.zh: 我们创建了一个新的基准，名为StepEval-Audio-360¹，遵循一系列规则。在设计原则方面，该基准旨在填补多模态语音交互评估的空白，系统性地识别模型的优缺点，并重视用户体验和安全性。在数据收集方面，结合使用真实用户录音和公共语料库。同时，对音频质量和语义标注进行严格控制，以确保符合隐私要求。

items.en: The evaluation dimensions mainly cover language proficiency, emotional intelligence, logical reasoning, creativity, multi-instruction following, role-playing, safety, etc. Demographic differences (age/ gender/ dialect), environmental conditions (noise level/ microphone type), and prosodic features (speech rate/ pronunciation pattern) are also taken into account. The indicator system architecture combines quantitative analysis, uses scripts for automatic verification of indicators such as accuracy rate and repetition rate, and also involves evaluation by large language models and human. In addition, quarterly updates of the benchmark are carried out to avoid falling behind, and adjustments are made in light of user feedback.
items.zh: 评估维度主要涵盖语言能力、情商、逻辑推理、创造力、多指令遵循、角色扮演、安全性等。还考虑了人口统计学差异（年龄/性别/方言）、环境条件（噪声水平/麦克风类型）和韵律特征（语速/发音模式）。指标体系架构结合了定量分析，使用脚本自动验证准确率、重复率等指标，并涉及大语言模型评估和人工评估。此外，基准每季度更新一次以避免落后，并根据用户反馈进行调整。

items.en: We conducted validation experiments with a 3B model to compare the performance of Semantic Code and Dual-Code on ASR (Automatic Speech Recognition) tasks. While keeping the same amount of audio training data, the Character Error Rate (CER) of the Dual-Code approach improved from 25.5 to 18.4. This demonstrates that the Dual-Code method significantly enhances performance on ASR tasks.
items.zh: 我们使用3B模型进行了验证实验，比较了语义编码和双编码在自动语音识别（ASR）任务上的性能。在保持相同音频训练数据量的情况下，双编码方法的字符错误率（CER）从25.5降低到18.4。这表明双编码方法显著提升了ASR任务的性能。

items.en: We tested the performance of the model at two stages: first, the pre-trained model (Step-Audio Pretrain) ; and second, the chat model (Step-Audio-Chat) , after the alignment of human preference, using the system prompt “ 请记录下你所听到的语音内容。 ”. The evaluation datasets include Aishell1, Aishell2 ios, Wenetspeech test-net, Wenetspeech test-meeting, Librispeech test-clean, and Librispeech test-other. For the evaluation metrics, we employ the character error rate (CER) for Chinese and word error rate (WER) for English. We systematically compared the following two categories of mainstream large speech models:
items.zh: 我们在两个阶段测试了模型的性能：首先是预训练模型（Step-Audio Pretrain），其次是在人类偏好对齐后的聊天模型（Step-Audio-Chat），使用系统提示“请记录下你所听到的语音内容。”评估数据集包括Aishell1、Aishell2 ios、Wenetspeech test-net、Wenetspeech test-meeting、Librispeech test-clean和Librispeech test-other。评估指标采用中文的字符错误率（CER）和英文的词错误率（WER）。我们系统比较了以下两类主流大型语音模型：

items.en: Hidden feature modeling: Whisper Large-v3 (Radford \BOthers., \APACyear2023), Qwen2-Audio (Chu \BOthers., \APACyear2024\APACexlab\BCnt1), MinMo (Q. Chen \BOthers., \APACyear2025), LUCY (H. Gao \BOthers., \APACyear2025);
items.zh: 隐特征建模：Whisper Large-v3 (Radford \BOthers., \APACyear2023)、Qwen2-Audio (Chu \BOthers., \APACyear2024\APACexlab\BCnt1)、MinMo (Q. Chen \BOthers., \APACyear2025)、LUCY (H. Gao \BOthers., \APACyear2025)；

items.en: Discrete audio token modeling: Moshi (Défossez \BOthers., \APACyear2024), GLM-4-voice (Zeng \BOthers., \APACyear2024), Step-Audio.
items.zh: 离散音频令牌建模：Moshi (Défossez \BOthers., \APACyear2024)、GLM-4-voice (Zeng \BOthers., \APACyear2024)、Step-Audio。

items.en: The specific results are shown in Table 1. Among the audio token-based speech models, Step-Audio Pretrain achieved the best performance with an average CER of 4.64. Compared to the hidden feature models, Step-Audio Pretrain outperformed Whisper Large-v3 and achieved comparable results to Qwen2-Audio and MinMo, particularly on the clean test sets of Aishell1, Aishell2 and Librispeech test-clean, where Step-Audio Pretrain (average CER 2.05 ) was very close to Qwen2-Audio (average CER 2.06). This indicates that Step-Audio, through its dual-codebook compression strategy, has effectively preserved semantic information during the discretization of speech representation.
items.zh: 具体结果如表1所示。在基于音频令牌的语音模型中，Step-Audio Pretrain取得了最佳性能，平均CER为4.64。与隐特征模型相比，Step-Audio Pretrain优于Whisper Large-v3，并与Qwen2-Audio和MinMo结果相当，特别是在Aishell1、Aishell2和Librispeech test-clean的干净测试集上，Step-Audio Pretrain（平均CER 2.05）非常接近Qwen2-Audio（平均CER 2.06）。这表明Step-Audio通过其双码本压缩策略，在语音表示的离散化过程中有效保留了语义信息。

items.en: Additionally, we compared the ASR capabilities of the final conversational models. When testing the GLM-4-voice Chat model, we experimented with various prompts and ultimately selected the prompt “ 请写下你听到的语音内容： ” for evaluation. However, the model still struggled to follow instructions effectively. In contrast, the Step-Audio Chat model achieved an average CER of 5.89, maintaining strong performance, which reflects its robust ability to follow instructions.
items.zh: 此外，我们比较了最终对话模型的ASR能力。在测试GLM-4-voice Chat模型时，我们尝试了多种提示，最终选择提示“请写下你听到的语音内容：”进行评估。然而，该模型仍然难以有效遵循指令。相比之下，Step-Audio Chat模型实现了5.89的平均CER，保持了强劲性能，反映了其稳健的指令遵循能力。

items.en: To evaluate the TTS performance of Step-Audio, we utilized the SEED TTS test dataset (Anastassiou \BOthers., \APACyear2024). The model was prompted to reproduce the original input text. Although this approach cannot guarantee the consistency between input and output contents, we believe that erroneous outputs also objectively reflect the model’s ability to follow instructions. Therefore, we employed Paraformer (Z. Gao \BOthers., \APACyear2022) and Whisper-Large-V3 (Radford \BOthers., \APACyear2023) to calculate the error rate for Chinese and English, respectively. The results are summarized in Table 2. Step-Audio achieved the best CER and WER performance among open-source spoken models.
items.zh: 为了评估Step-Audio的文本转语音（TTS）性能，我们使用了SEED TTS测试数据集（Anastassiou \BOthers., \APACyear2024）。模型被提示复现原始输入文本。尽管这种方法无法保证输入和输出内容的一致性，但我们认为错误输出也客观反映了模型遵循指令的能力。因此，我们使用Paraformer（Z. Gao \BOthers., \APACyear2022）和Whisper-Large-V3（Radford \BOthers., \APACyear2023）分别计算中文和英文的错误率。结果总结在表2中。Step-Audio在开源语音模型中取得了最佳的CER和WER性能。

items.en: For the TTS task, we evaluated the performance of open-source TTS models on the SEED test sets using Paraformer (Z. Gao \BOthers., \APACyear2022) and Whisper-Large-v3 (Radford \BOthers., \APACyear2023). And the ERes2Net (Y. Chen \BOthers., \APACyear2023) model is employed to evaluate speaker similarity. The results are summarized in Table 3. Our 3-Billion parameter version of Step-Audio-TTS-3B with dual-codebooks achieved SoTA results in terms of CER and WER among the open-source models, while also demonstrating highly competitive similarity scores. Notably, scaling the LLM to 130 billion parameters yielded substantial improvements in both CER and WER, suggesting the potential benefits of further scaling both synthetic data and model parameters.
items.zh: 对于TTS任务，我们使用Paraformer（Z. Gao \BOthers., \APACyear2022）和Whisper-Large-v3（Radford \BOthers., \APACyear2023）评估了开源TTS模型在SEED测试集上的性能。并采用ERes2Net（Y. Chen \BOthers., \APACyear2023）模型评估说话人相似度。结果总结在表3中。我们的30亿参数版本Step-Audio-TTS-3B采用双码本，在开源模型中取得了CER和WER的最优结果（SoTA），同时展示了极具竞争力的相似度分数。值得注意的是，将大语言模型（LLM）扩展到1300亿参数在CER和WER上均带来了显著改进，表明进一步扩展合成数据和模型参数具有潜在收益。

items.en: To evaluate the benefits of the dual-codebook approach, we compare the resynthesis quality of various tokens including: single cosyvoice codebook (Du, Chen\BCBL \BOthers., \APACyear2024), and dual-codebook, on the aforementioned SEED test sets. The test speech is first quantized into discrete tokens and then reconstructed into waveforms using the token2wav process. We assess the quality of the tokens in terms of speech intelligibility and speaker similarity. The results of this comparison are presented in Table 4 which shows that the dual-codebook approach achieves a lower CER while maintaining an acceptable level of degradation of speaker similarity.
items.zh: 为了评估双码本方法的优势，我们在上述SEED测试集上比较了各种令牌的重合成质量，包括：单cosyvoice码本（Du, Chen\BCBL \BOthers., \APACyear2024）和双码本。测试语音首先被量化为离散令牌，然后通过token2wav过程重建为波形。我们从语音可懂度和说话人相似度方面评估令牌质量。比较结果见表4，显示双码本方法在保持说话人相似度可接受退化水平的同时，实现了更低的CER。

items.en: As illustrated in the Table 5, we compared the real-time dialogue performance of Step-Audio and open-source models use StepEval-Audio-360 benckmark mentioned in section 6.1. The scores of each metric are automatically assessed by GPT-4o. And the average scores are shown in the table while the best results are shown in bold. Since the main content of this benchmark is in Chinese, and Moshi has almost no understanding of Chinese, the results from Moshi are marked with “*” and should be considered for reference only. The results indicated that Step-Audio-Chat demonstrated superior performance in real-time dialogue.
items.zh: 如表5所示，我们使用第6.1节中提到的StepEval-Audio-360基准比较了Step-Audio和开源模型的实时对话性能。每个指标的分数由GPT-4o自动评估。表中显示平均分数，最佳结果以粗体显示。由于该基准的主要内容是中文，而Moshi几乎不理解中文，因此Moshi的结果用“*”标记，仅供参考。结果表明Step-Audio-Chat在实时对话中表现出优越性能。

items.en: Factuality: Step-Audio-Chat achieves the highest score of 66.4%, significantly surpassing the other models. This indicates that Step-Audio-Chat provides responses that are more accurate and reliable, adhering closely to the factual information.
items.zh: 事实性：Step-Audio-Chat以66.4%的最高分数显著超越其他模型。这表明Step-Audio-Chat提供的回答更准确可靠，紧密遵循事实信息。

items.en: Relevance: With a score of 75.2%, Step-Audio-Chat also excels in relevance, demonstrating its ability to generate contextually appropriate and meaningful responses to user queries.
items.zh: 相关性：Step-Audio-Chat以75.2%的分数在相关性方面也表现出色，展示了其生成上下文适当且有意义的用户查询回答的能力。

items.en: Chat Score: With the highest overall chat score (4.11), Step-Audio-Chat provides a superior overall voice chat experience. This score, ranging from 1 (lowest) to 5 (highest), represents a comprehensive evaluation by GPT-4o based on the textual input and output of the conversations.
items.zh: 聊天分数：Step-Audio-Chat以最高的整体聊天分数（4.11）提供了卓越的整体语音聊天体验。该分数范围从1（最低）到5（最高），代表GPT-4o基于对话文本输入和输出的综合评估。

items.en: To further contextualize Step-Audio-Chat’s performance, we conducted evaluations on several publicly available datasets. Among them, Web Questions, Llama Questions, and TriviaQA are knowledge-based question-answering datasets, while ComplexBench and the listening comprehension section of the Hanyu Shuiping Kaoshi (HSK-6) are comprehensive tests. We utilized the full test sets for Web Questions and Llama Questions. For TriviaQA, which lacks ground truth answers for the official test set, we constructed a 1000-sample test set from the development set. This subset comprised 500 samples each from the Wikipedia and Web verified sets, supplemented with data from the Web and Wikipedia dev sets. Due to this non-standard test set, TriviaQA results should be considered preliminary and for reference purposes only. While Llama Questions provided spoken questions, we used TTS to generate spoken versions of the questions for Web Questions, TriviaQA, ComplexBench and HSK-6, enabling an Audio Question-Text Answer (AQTA) evaluation.
items.zh: 为了进一步说明Step-Audio-Chat的性能，我们在几个公开数据集上进行了评估。其中，Web Questions、Llama Questions和TriviaQA是基于知识的问答数据集，而ComplexBench和汉语水平考试（HSK-6）的听力理解部分是综合测试。我们使用了Web Questions和Llama Questions的完整测试集。对于TriviaQA，由于官方测试集缺乏真实答案，我们从开发集中构建了一个1000样本的测试集。该子集包含来自Wikipedia和Web验证集的各500个样本，并补充了来自Web和Wikipedia开发集的数据。由于这个非标准测试集，TriviaQA结果应视为初步结果，仅供参考。虽然Llama Questions提供了语音问题，但我们使用TTS为Web Questions、TriviaQA、ComplexBench和HSK-6生成了语音版本的问题，实现了音频问题-文本回答（AQTA）评估。

items.en: Performance data for Moshi (Défossez \BOthers., \APACyear2024), Freeze-Omni (Wang \BOthers., \APACyear2024), LUCY (H. Gao \BOthers., \APACyear2025), and MinMo (Q. Chen \BOthers., \APACyear2025) were taken from their respective publications. Step-Audio-Chat and Qwen2-audio (Chu \BOthers., \APACyear2024\APACexlab\BCnt1) results were obtained through local API inference. For LUCY, we report the best results from its stage 2 (S2) and stage 3 (S3) training phases, as presented in the original publication. GPT-4o was used to assess the accuracy of the model’s textual responses against the original textual questions. Table 6 presents the average accuracy scores, demonstrating that Step-Audio-Chat achieved the highest accuracy across all open-source benchmarks. The accuracy score for Step-Audio-Chat on the Llama Question dataset is italicized to indicate that we corrected several errors in the evaluation set. In addition to the automated metrics, we conducted a human evaluation as shown in Figure 1. The results corroborate the automated evaluation, showing a clear and consistent advantage for Step-Audio across all assessed dimensions.
items.zh: Moshi（Défossez \BOthers., \APACyear2024）、Freeze-Omni（Wang \BOthers., \APACyear2024）、LUCY（H. Gao \BOthers., \APACyear2025）和MinMo（Q. Chen \BOthers., \APACyear2025）的性能数据取自各自出版物。Step-Audio-Chat和Qwen2-audio（Chu \BOthers., \APACyear2024\APACexlab\BCnt1）的结果通过本地API推理获得。对于LUCY，我们报告了其原始出版物中阶段2（S2）和阶段3（S3）的最佳结果。GPT-4o用于评估模型文本回答相对于原始文本问题的准确性。表6展示了平均准确率分数，表明Step-Audio-Chat在所有开源基准中取得了最高准确率。Step-Audio-Chat在Llama Question数据集上的准确率分数以斜体表示，以表明我们纠正了评估集中的几个错误。除了自动评估指标，我们还进行了人工评估，如图1所示。结果证实了自动评估，显示Step-Audio在所有评估维度上具有明显且一致的优势。

items.en: Audio instruction following reflects the model’s capability to generate accurate audio and textual content in response to input instructions. Consequently, we have developed a benchmark for Audio Instruction Following, encompassing categories such as Languages, Role-playing, Singing / RAP, and Voice Control. The evaluation comprises the accuracy of instruction following and quality of generated speech, both assessed using a 1-5 Mean Opinion Score (MOS) scale. As demonstrated in Table 7, Step-Audio-Chat shows competitive results in audio instruction following and audio quality respectively.
items.zh: 音频指令遵循反映了模型根据输入指令生成准确音频和文本内容的能力。因此，我们开发了一个音频指令遵循基准，涵盖语言、角色扮演、唱歌/说唱和语音控制等类别。评估包括指令遵循的准确性和生成语音的质量，均使用1-5平均意见得分（MOS）量表。如表7所示，Step-Audio-Chat在音频指令遵循和音频质量方面分别展示了有竞争力的结果。

items.en: The proposed Step-Audio system enables real-time tool call during voice interactions. Due to the substantial bitrate disparity between real-time text responses and their corresponding audio streams, our framework achieves asynchronous tool invocation while maintaining seamless voice interaction. As illustrated in Figure 7, the architecture decouples text-based tool processing from audio generation pipelines, allowing parallel execution of external service queries (e.g. knowledge retrieval) and speech synthesis. This design eliminates waiting time for audio rendering when tool calling is required, significantly enhancing interaction fluidity.
items.zh: 所提出的Step-Audio系统能够在语音交互中实现实时工具调用。由于实时文本响应与其对应音频流之间存在显著的比特率差异，我们的框架实现了异步工具调用，同时保持无缝的语音交互。如图7所示，该架构将基于文本的工具处理与音频生成流水线解耦，允许外部服务查询（例如知识检索）和语音合成并行执行。这种设计消除了需要工具调用时音频渲染的等待时间，显著增强了交互流畅性。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Architecture of asynchronous tool call in Step-Audio. The text processing thread handles tool calls while the audio generation thread produces speech streams concurrently.
items.capZh: 图7：Step-Audio中异步工具调用的架构。文本处理线程处理工具调用，而音频生成线程同时生成语音流。

items.en: In this paper, we present Step-Audio, an innovative framework for real-time voice interaction. During the pretraining stage, our dual-codebook speech tokenizer bridges textual and acoustic modalities using 3.3T tokens of multi-modal data, establishing cross-modal alignment. In the post-training phase, we conducted task-specific SFT for TTS and ASR tasks, while implementing SFT with diversified high-quality datasets combined with RLHF for AQTA tasks to enhance response quality, enabling fine-grained control over emotional modulation, dialect adaptation, and prosodic pattern generation. Through engineering innovations including speculative streaming with sliced latency compensation and efficient full-duplex coordination, Step-Audio achieves fluid conversational dynamics. The performance metrics from benchmark evaluations across tasks including ASR, TTS, and AQTA demonstrate Step-Audio’s exceptional capabilities in speech dialogue.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提出了Step-Audio，一个创新的实时语音交互框架。在预训练阶段，我们的双码本语音分词器使用3.3T令牌的多模态数据桥接文本和声学模态，建立跨模态对齐。在后训练阶段，我们对TTS和ASR任务进行了任务特定的监督微调（SFT），同时针对AQTA任务实施了多样化高质量数据集的SFT结合基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF），以增强响应质量，实现对情感调节、方言适应和韵律模式生成的细粒度控制。通过工程创新，包括带切片延迟补偿的投机性流式传输和高效的全双工协调，Step-Audio实现了流畅的对话动态。跨ASR、TTS和AQTA等任务的基准评估性能指标展示了Step-Audio在语音对话中的卓越能力。

items.en: In this work, we have demonstrated Step-Audio’s current capabilities in cross-modal integration between speech and text, as part of Step-Audio’s initial implementation aimed at trimodal systems. Moving forward, three key areas warrant further exploration: first, extending the framework to achieve native trimodal understanding that incorporates vision, speech, and text; second, enhancing pure voice dialogue efficiency by eliminating intermediate cross-modal conversions in AQAA scenarios; and third, implementing deep-thinking-enhanced tool calls to enhance intelligent interaction capabilities with external knowledge bases.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们展示了Step-Audio当前在语音和文本之间跨模态集成方面的能力，这是Step-Audio初始实现的一部分，旨在实现三模态系统。未来，三个关键领域值得进一步探索：首先，扩展框架以实现包含视觉、语音和文本的原生三模态理解；其次，通过消除AQAA场景中的中间跨模态转换来提高纯语音对话效率；第三，实现深度思考增强的工具调用，以增强与外部知识库的智能交互能力。
